tasks.description: Removed Agent Metrics Dashboard section from CPM report email. Stripped metricsSection parameter and template reference from buildHtmlReport() in report-html.js, removed buildEmailMetricsSection call and import from cpm-report.js, and mirrored both changes in daily-report.mjs.

Reviewed all documentation files (Architecture Guide, Project Summary, REFERENCE.md, ARCHITECTURE-REVIEW.md, skills) against actual codebase to identify inaccuracies. Confirmed Guild agent is a metrics layer called by Pipeline 1, not an independent report runner. Confirmed no Guild time trigger exists.

Updated Architecture & ROI Guide (fixed Pipeline 3 diagram, Guild component card, trigger governance section), Project Summary (clarified Guild automation claim), ARCHITECTURE-REVIEW.md (marked 6 of 7 items complete, rewrote as current-state doc), and generate-dashboard.mjs (added local preview tool notice).
tasks.output: CPM Agent — Architecture & ROI Guide.html, CPM Agent System — Project Summary (Updated).html, ARCHITECTURE-REVIEW.md, cpm-vercel/scripts/generate-dashboard.mjs
